Matches.Description: The 1st Test of the New Zealand Tour of England 2026 marks the start of a three match Test series. Watch England vs New Zealand 1st Test live in HD on tapmad, with official match coverage and uninterrupted streaming. These top-ranked red-ball teams, to begin with a strong squad, England cricket team focusing on balance and pace control. New Zealand, led by Tom Latham, rely on experienced players such as Kane Williamson & Devon Conway to apply early pressure and dominate key phases.

The 3rd ODI of the Australia Tour of Pakistan 2026 marks the start of a three-match Odi series. Watch Pakistan vs Australia 3rd Odi live in HD on tapmad, with official match coverage and uninterrupted streaming. These top-ranked white-ball teams, to begin with a strong squad, Pakistan cricket team featuring Babar Azam and Shaheen Afridi focusing on balance and pace control. Australia, led by Mitchell Marsh, rely on experienced players such as Adam Zampa & Matt Short to apply early pressure and dominate key phases.

Watch India vs Afghanistan 1st Test live in HD on tapmad, with official match coverage and uninterrupted streaming.
